'''Flankers''' was a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]<ref name="Missing" /> in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> Its [[Star/Legends|star]] went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], destroying the entire [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Just prior to the explosion, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial garrison (Flankers)|garrison]] on the planet was abandoned.<ref name="Missing" />
